Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}My name is Igor. I am delighted to make your acquaintance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}This is Elizabeth. She's a resident here, like myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}This place exists between dream and reality, mind and matter...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Only those who have signed the contract can enter this place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}That's the document I signed at the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}From now on, you shall be welcome here as a guest in the Velvet Room.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}You are destined to hone your unique ability, and you will require my assistance to do so.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I only ask one thing in return...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Abide by your contract, and assume full responsibility for the choices you make.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Precisely... You are fast asleep in the real world as we speak.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}This visit of yours is merely a dream.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}However, you will come here of your own accord sooner or later.[n]{f 1 1}
